calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Lisa McCally appearing for Department of Child Support Services. Glen Moss appearing for Trustee. Janice Strong appearing for Robert Wiggs. Stipulation to modify the Court's order to allow a refinance rather than a sale of the property. All parties are in agreement. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Ptn. To Enforce Cs Order Against Trust
Off Calendar Oct-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Glen Moss (Counsel for Barbara Gemignani, Trustee); Lisa McCally (Counsel for the Department of Child Support Services); RoseAnn Rontandaro (Counsel for Robert Wiggs); Barbara Genignani (Trustee); Robert Wiggs (Trust Beneficiary); Teresa Shields (Trust Beneficiary); Michael Wiggs (Trust Beneficiary); Hilary Corritore (beneficiary of Child Support Order).

After presentation by all counsel concerning the status of the matter in general and the status of possible purchase loans by certain of the trust beneficiaries, the Court found that Robert Wiggs had failed to secure loan financing in a timely manner as directed in the Court's Order of October 17, 2006. As a result, the Court ordered the real property listed for sale. The Court also ordered the reimbursement of expenses for Ms. Gemignani and Ms. Corritore upon presentation of competent evidence for the same. Finally, the Court reserved a right of first refusal to the trust beneficiaries for purchase of the property. Mr. Moss is to prepare the order.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

Ptn. To Enforce Cs Order Against Trust
Off Calendar Oct-17-2006 Continued To Oct-31-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Glen Moss appearing for and with Barbara Gemignani. Lisa McCally appearing for Dept of Child Support Services. Also appearing Robert Wiggs and Teresa Shields.
Mr. Moss informs the court that the appraisal on the property was just recieved yesterday and that the property was appraised at $725,000.00. Mr Wiggs and Ms. Shields inform the court that they in the process of applying for a home loan. The matter is continued to October 31, 2006. Mr Moss is to be prepared to proceed with the sale of the property through the court in the event that Mr Wiggs amd Ms Shields are unable to obtain a loan. A writ of possession will be issued as of November 1, 2006. All parties are directed to appear at this hearing.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Susan Lee CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Ptn. To Enforce Cs Order Against Trust
Off Calendar Aug-15-2006 Continued To Oct-17-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Glen Moss appearing for and with trustee. Lisa McCally appearing for Dept. of Child Support Services. Robert Wiggs and Theresa Shields are also in court. Not all of the beneficiaries are presented. Court has no problem with a lien on Robert Wiggs' interest. Robert Wiggs states that it is not his mother's wish to sell the house. He wants to buy the house. He has not been working because he has been taking care of his parents. Court is continuing this matter for 60 days. Court is inclined to order the sale of the real property. Robert Wiggs must have a concrete plan to buy the property and he must have the money for the house and the child support payment. Matter is continued to 10/17. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Ptn. To Enforce Cs Order Against Trust
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Continued To Aug-15-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
